Egg.Body: You're inside an egg. Something primal urges you to

OutEgg.Body:
You break free from your egg, spilling out onto the honeycomb beneath.

An adult worker walks up to you.

'Oh! Good Morning little one, you must be one of the new-bees. Ha! Get it?
Anyways, you've been assigned to the armory, go down the right tunnel!'

Hive Background.Body:
You're in your hive. Hexagons line the floor, the walls, and the ceiling, tunnels winding off in every direction.
Your sisters buzz around you.

Left Tunnel.Body: You enter the left tunnel, walking through a crowd of bees.

Royal Chambers.Body:
You enter the royal chambers. The Queen is sitting upon a throne, hundreds of bees buzzing past.
She glances at you for just a moment before handing a paper to another bee, who flies over to you and gives you a piece of paper.

'This is a decree stating that you are allowed into the armory. Now go little one, the queen is busy enough as is.'

Right Tunnel.Body: You enter the right tunnel, bees adorned with helmets of wax and spears of sticks everywhere.

Armory Door.Body:
You walk up to the armory. A guard stops you, towering above.

'Hey. If you wanna go in here, you'll need a decree from the Queen.'

Choices.LockedText: The guard blocks you. You need a Royal Decree to enter.

Armory.Body: You enter the armory, and are handed a helmet, along with a small spear made of a thorn.

Hive Background 2.Body:
You're in your hive. A soldier walks up to you.

'Ah, newbie. You're with me, we're gonna go collect pollen.'

Outside.Body:
You're outside your hive. The sun is low in the sky, casting an orange haze over the clouds.
You fly down with your senior warrior, landing on a firm blade of grass.

'Hey, think I see a flower over there. Looks like a dandelion. Let's go.'

Flower.Body: You fly over to the flower, hovering above the dandelion. It shines in the light.

Petal.Body: You land on a petal, before walking up to the stamen, pollen glimmering before you.

Interactables.Message: You collect pollen, stashing it away in pouches next to your legs.

Pollen Collector.Body:
You fly over to the pollen collector. She waves you over.

'Hey there, I'll take your pollen off your hands! Whatcha gonna do now?'

Hive Sleep.Body: You go home after a long day, cuddled up in your honeycomb, and fall asleep.

Stay Out.Body: You decide to stay out. Your elder warrior sister told you to be safe before she flew off to the hive. It's getting late.

Wasp Attack.Body: You wait for a moment, listening to thie weird buzzing, before a wasp LAUNCHES at you!
